hero.title: Builds websites that bring clients.
site.title: Filip Lopatka — Web Developer
site.description: Freelance web developer with 5+ years of experience. WordPress, AI integrations, modern frontend.
lang.switch.notAvailable: This content is not translated yet
about.title: About
about.subtitle: Web developer with 5+ years of experience
about.intro: I'm Filip Lopatka. I build websites for small-to-medium businesses, e-shops, and individual clients. I specialize in WordPress, modern frontend frameworks, and AI tool integration.
about.approach.title: How I work
about.approach.body: I start from the goal. Before the code, I figure out what the site needs to deliver — more inquiries, higher conversion, better speed, or simply a better impression. I don't start designing until I know who will use it and why. I communicate openly, ship in weekly or biweekly cycles, and work transparently — you see what's happening, and we adjust when needed.
about.values.title: What I believe
about.value.craft: Craft over trends. Good design doesn't need to prove itself every season.
about.value.speed: Speed. A 5-second load is a lost client.
about.value.ownership: Ownership. The client should understand how their site works and be able to take it over if I'm not available.
about.value.ai: AI as a tool, not magic. It speeds up 30% of the work — the rest still has to come from a person who knows what they're doing.
about.cta.title: Let's work together
about.cta.body: I'm looking for clients who care how their website looks and works.
services.title: Services
services.intro: I'll build you a new site or fix the one you have. Here's what I deliver — from ready-made WordPress sites through AI integrations to performance audits.
projects.title: Projects
projects.intro: A few projects from the last few years. Not all could be included — some clients don't want public disclosure, others are still live under NDA.

home.contactBody: I'm looking for clients who know what they want to achieve. We start with a conversation — free, no obligation.
